fromLine: Deallo | Afterline | Optimal Flow Agency | Hardy, AR

leads.hook: fellow Hardy shop — Adam Nicholson on BBB
leads.subject: quick question — Richard's missed calls (Hardy)
leads.body:
Hi Adam,

I'm in Hardy too. I help local HVAC shops recover missed calls and stale estimates — 100% remote, nothing to install on-site.

When your crew is on a job and a lead calls, what happens after hours? Most shops lose 2–4 jobs a month from slow text-back, not bad work.

We run missed-call text (under 60 sec), estimate follow-up, and review requests. $497 pilot / 30 days — one extra job usually covers it.

15-min audit (no pitch deck): https://ofa-code.github.io/afterline/book.html

— Deallo | Afterline | Optimal Flow Agency | Hardy AR

leads.subject: missed calls — remote follow-up for Serveway
leads.body:
Hi Brian,

Serveway's reviews stand out in Dallas — phones must be busy in season.

Quick question: when a call is missed on a job, does anyone text back same day? We help HVAC shops automate that in your voice (templates you approve) — 100% remote.

$497 pilot / 30 days: missed-call text, estimate nudges, review requests. One recovered job usually covers the pilot.

Book a 15-min audit: https://ofa-code.github.io/afterline/book.html

— Deallo | Afterline | Optimal Flow Agency
